description: arXiv:2603.26863v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Answer Set Programming (ASP) is a declarative programming language used for modeling and solving complex combinatorial problems. It has been successfully applied to a number of different real-world problems. However, learning its usage can prove challenging as the declarative language, from a conceptual perspective, differs substantially...
author: Rafael Martins, Matthias Knorr, Ricardo Gon\c{c}alves
